description: a4/ workspace lifecycle hooks for Codex and Claude Code. Codex plugin hooks provide PLUGIN_ROOT/CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT and PLUGIN_DATA/CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA; commands preserve CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR when Claude provides it and otherwise derive it from the current git root for Codex. Codex supports SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop; Claude Code additionally runs SessionEnd cleanup. The Python dispatcher `scripts/a4_hook.py` handles pre-edit, post-edit, stop, user-prompt, and session-start. Session-scoped state is kept under `.claude/tmp/a4-edited/`: edited paths, pre-edit status snapshots, new-file markers, resolved #id tokens, and authoring-contract injection dedupe. For Codex apply_patch payloads, the dispatcher extracts touched markdown paths from `tool_input.command`; PreToolUse stores state only because Codex does not currently inject PreToolUse additionalContext, while PostToolUse performs stamping, cascade, updated refresh, and consistency reporting. Stop validates frontmatter and transition legality for files recorded during the session. UserPromptSubmit resolves `#<id>` references to a4 paths. SessionStart injects the a4 type-to-location map and reserved `created:` / `updated:` directive.

hooks.description: Snapshot on-disk a4/*.md `status:` and, in Claude Code, inject first-edit authoring-contract pointers
Record edited a4/*.md files, stamp created/updated, run status-change cascade, and report status-consistency
Validate a4/*.md files edited this session; emit JSON `{decision: block, reason}` on violations to force a fix/continuation
Claude Code only: delete this session's a4 record files
Sweep orphan a4 record files older than 1 day
Inject type-to-file-location map and reserved frontmatter-field directive as additionalContext
Resolve #<id> references in the prompt to a4/<type>/<id>-<slug>.md paths (per-session dedupe)
